name: Pineapple Upside-Down Cake (Skillet)
recipeIngredient: 1 can Pineapple Slices In Syrup (1 pound 4 ozs)
1/4 cup Vegetable Oil (Or Solid Vegetable Shortening)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple and reserve 2 tablespoons of the juice.
2. Melt the butter in a heavy, ovenproof skillet.
3. Stir in the brown sugar and reserved pineapple syrup; blend well.
4. Remove from heat and arrange pineapple slices evenly over the sugar mixture.
5. Place a maraschino cherry in the center of each slice.
6. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugars, baking powder, and salt.
7. Add milk and oil; beat with an electric mixer on high speed for 2 minutes.
8. Beat in egg, lemon rind, lemon juice, and vanilla extract for another 2 minutes.
9. Pour batter over pineapple mixture, spreading evenly.
10. Bake preheated oven for 25 minutes or until done.
11. Cool on a wire rack for 5 minutes; invert skillet and plate onto serving dish.
12. Serve warm.
